steps.t: Dagrun has been waiting for you. You should talk to Dagrun.
Hoskuld ran into the kitchen, seeming unwell. You should talk to Dagrun.
Hoskuld ran into the kitchen, seemingly unwell. You should check on Hoskuld.
Hoskuld is dead! You should talk to Dagrun!
Háta did not return with the others. You should find Háta.
Háta is dead! You should talk to Dagrun!
The dinner guests have all split up. You should talk to Dagrun.
Maeriel has left the room, angered at the other guests' behaviour. You should go check on Maeriel.
Maeriel is dead! You should talk to Dagrun!
Thewár has suddenly fallen down the stairs! You should check on Thewár!
Thewár is dead! You should talk to Dagrun!
A loud crash came from upstairs. You should find the source of the crash.
Captain Álarr has arrived downstairs. You should talk to Álarr.
You must accuse someone of murder! Choose wisely!
Rikolf the Elder wants to speak with you. You should talk to Rikolf the Elder.
Dagrun has been named Master! You should talk to Dagrun.
